description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, defines the variables CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE and the stages build, test, release, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs the global before_script (docker info and docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com) then executes docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test job that pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and runs docker run $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE sh -c "COORDINATE_ENV=ci /code/bin/test.sh". In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch and runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE. In the deploy stage add two jobs: deploy_feature, which runs manually on branches matching the regex /^[\d]+[\w-_]+$/ and executes ./bin/deploy.sh with TARGET_ENV=staging targeting the Staging Kafeina.co environment at http://coordinate-staging.kafeina.co/; and deploy_staging, which runs automatically on the master branch, also runs ./bin/deploy.sh with TARGET_ENV=staging and deploys to the same Staging Kafeina.co environment.
